seoTitle: Harrington Park vs Hartley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Harrington Park and Hartley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Harrington Park vs Hartley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Harrington Park and Hartley.
heading: Harrington Park vs Hartley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Harrington Park, New South Wales and Hartley, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hartley has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Harrington Park (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Harrington Park or Hartley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Harrington Park has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Hartley scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Harrington Park scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Hartley scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Harrington Park or Hartley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hartley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
